templates.template_description: Federal court complaint format for civil rights cases under 42 U.S.C. § 1983, following Federal Rules of Civil Procedure

rules.rule_description: Proper caption format for federal district court

rule_config.error_message: Caption must include 'UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT' and district name

rules.rule_description: Federal complaint must state basis for federal jurisdiction (FRCP 8(a))

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must include jurisdiction statement citing 28 U.S.C. § 1331 or § 1343 (FRCP 8(a))

rules.rule_description: Federal complaint must state venue basis

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must include venue statement (28 U.S.C. § 1391)

rules.rule_description: Complaint must identify all parties

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must identify all parties (FRCP 8(a))

rules.rule_description: Civil rights complaint must cite 42 U.S.C. § 1983

rule_config.error_message: Civil rights complaint must cite 42 U.S.C. § 1983

rules.rule_description: Complaint must specify which constitutional rights were violated

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must specify which constitutional rights were violated

rules.rule_name: Under Color of State Law Allegation
rules.rule_description: Section 1983 complaint must allege actions under color of state law

rule_config.error_message: Section 1983 complaint must allege defendants acted 'under color of state law'

rules.rule_description: Each claim should be stated in a separate count (FRCP 10(b))

rule_config.error_message: Claims should be separately stated in numbered counts (FRCP 10(b))

rules.rule_description: Complaint must include prayer for relief (FRCP 8(a))

rule_config.error_message: Complaint must include prayer for relief (FRCP 8(a)(3))

rules.rule_description: If demanding jury trial, must be included (FRCP 38)

rule_config.error_message: If demanding jury trial, include demand section (FRCP 38)

templates.template_description: Motion to dismiss for failure to state a claim under FRCP 12(b)(6)

rules.rule_description: Proper motion title with FRCP citation

rule_config.error_message: Motion should reference FRCP 12(b)(6) in title

rules.rule_description: Motion must state the standard of review (Bell Atlantic v. Twombly, Ashcroft v. Iqbal)

rule_config.error_message: Motion should cite Twombly/Iqbal standard for 12(b)(6) dismissal

rules.rule_description: Motion must clearly state why complaint fails to state a claim

rule_config.error_message: Motion must clearly articulate why complaint fails to state a claim

rules.rule_description: Motion should cite federal case law supporting dismissal

rule_config.error_message: Motion should cite supporting federal case law

rules.rule_description: Motion should include proposed order per local rules

rule_config.error_message: Motion should include proposed order (check local rules)

rules.rule_description: Motion must include specific relief requested

rule_config.error_message: Motion must include prayer for specific relief

templates.template_description: Motion for summary judgment under FRCP 56

rules.rule_description: Motion title should reference FRCP 56

rule_config.error_message: Motion should reference FRCP 56

rules.rule_description: Motion must include statement of material facts not in dispute (FRCP 56(c))

rule_config.error_message: Motion must include statement of undisputed material facts (FRCP 56(c))

rules.rule_description: Each fact must cite to specific record evidence

rule_config.error_message: Facts must cite to specific record evidence (depositions, affidavits, etc.)

rules.rule_description: Motion should state summary judgment standard (Celotex, Anderson, Matsushita trilogy)

keywords: entitled to judgment as a matter of law
rule_config.error_message: Motion should state summary judgment standard (FRCP 56(a))

rules.rule_description: Motion should include legal argument memorandum

rule_config.error_message: Motion should include memorandum of law in support

rules.rule_description: Proposed order should be attached

rule_config.error_message: Motion should include proposed order

templates.template_description: Notice of removal from state court to federal district court

rules.rule_description: Document must be titled 'Notice of Removal'

rule_config.error_message: Document must be titled 'NOTICE OF REMOVAL'

rules.rule_description: Notice must state basis for removal (28 U.S.C. § 1441, § 1446)

rule_config.error_message: Notice must cite 28 U.S.C. § 1441 and § 1446

rules.rule_description: Notice must state grounds for federal jurisdiction (diversity or federal question)

rule_config.error_message: Notice must state grounds for federal jurisdiction (§ 1331 or § 1332)

rules.rule_description: Notice must identify state court case

rule_config.error_message: Notice must identify state court, case number, and filing date

rules.rule_description: Notice should state removal is timely (within 30 days)

rule_config.error_message: Notice should state removal is timely under 28 U.S.C. § 1446(b)

rules.rule_description: All state court documents must be attached

rule_config.error_message: Must attach copies of all state court pleadings and process (§ 1446(a))
